title: Traveler's Backpack Overhaul
description: A resource pack for Traveler's Backpack mod.
body:
This Resourcepack overhauls the old and loved backpack from **[Traveler's Backpack Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack).**

I didn't like how the sleeping bag looked like so.. here it is, enjoy!

![An example of the changes.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c069415e9e73f47fd9e0254b1bf81569f97cb730_0.webp)
